inform.name: INFORM Risk Index
inform.description: EU Joint Research Centre composite risk index covering hazard, exposure, vulnerability, and coping capacity

gpi.name: Global Peace Index
gpi.description: Institute for Economics and Peace annual ranking of 163 countries by peacefulness

advisories.name: Government Travel Advisories
advisories.description: Official travel advisory levels from US State Department and UK FCDO

advisories_tier1.name: Tier 1 Government Travel Advisories
advisories_tier1.description: Official travel advisory levels from Germany (AA), Netherlands (BZ), Japan (MOFA), and Slovakia (MZV)

advisories_tier2a.name: Tier 2a Government Travel Advisories
advisories_tier2a.description: Official travel advisory levels from France (MEAE), New Zealand (SafeTravel), Ireland (DFA), Finland (UM), Hong Kong (OTA), Brazil (Itamaraty), Austria (BMEIA), and Philippines (DFA)

advisories_tier2b.name: Tier 2b Government Travel Advisories
advisories_tier2b.description: Official travel advisory levels from Belgium (MFA), Denmark (UM), Singapore (MFA), Romania (MAE), Serbia (MFA), Estonia (Kriis), Croatia (MVEP), and Argentina (Cancilleria)

advisories_tier3a.name: Tier 3a Government Travel Advisories (Complex)
advisories_tier3a.description: Official travel advisory levels from Italy (Viaggiare Sicuri), Spain (Exteriores), South Korea (MOFA), Taiwan (BOCA), China (MFA), and India (MEA)

advisories_tier3b.name: Tier 3b Government Travel Advisories (Complex)
advisories_tier3b.description: Official travel advisory levels from Switzerland (EDA), Sweden (UD), Norway (UD), Poland (MSZ), Czech Republic (MZV), Hungary (KKM), and Portugal (MNE)
